Astroflux Wiki
Guides Systems Stations Enemies Bosses Weapons Items Artifacts Drops Media Map

Artifacts

Classic artifacts are listed with their roll range, rarity, level gate, and drop weight. Use the calculator first, then filter the table if you want to narrow the pool.

Classic Artifact Calculator

Pick an artifact, set the level, and the calculator estimates its share of the eligible pool.

Choose an artifact to estimate odds.

Classic Artifacts

The table below keeps the important details on one line per artifact so the regular pool is easy to scan.

SpriteArtifactStat familyValue rangeRarityUpgradeableDrop weightLevelsType odds

Unique Artifact Sources

Unique artifacts stay in the same catalog with their boss sources, so the page is easier to scan.

SpriteUnique artifactStat familyBuff / debuffBossesLevelAdditional notes
AdvectorianFixed stat not exposed by the downloaded client cacheUnknownAdvectorian
Artifact 100% x6 @ 100%
unknownThe downloaded client cache does not expose a fixed stat type or value for this sprite.
Armorlock ProtocolStationary damage reduction: Adds damage reduction while stationary.
damageReductionWhileStationaryUnique		MixedNo strict boss match in client dataunknownAdds damage reduction while stationary.
Bloodline SurgeOn-kill surge: Kills grant a short stackable damage and mitigation boost.
bloodlineSurge		BuffNo strict boss match in client dataunknownKills grant a short stackable damage and mitigation boost.
Bullwark PrismUnique low shield reduction: Adds damage reduction when shields are low.
damageReductionWithLowShieldUnique		MixedNo strict boss match in client dataunknownAdds damage reduction when shields are low.
CleanerFixed stat not exposed by the downloaded client cacheUnknownThe Cleaner
Artifact 100% x6-10 @ 100%
unknownThe downloaded client cache does not expose a fixed stat type or value for this sprite.
Crown of XhersixCleansing crown: Automatically cleanses debuffs on a timer.
crownOfXhersix		UtilityThree Emperors
Artifact 100% x10 @ 99%
unknownAutomatically cleanses debuffs on a timer.
DominatorFixed stat not exposed by the downloaded client cacheUnknownDominator
Artifact 100% x1-3 @ 100%
unknownThe downloaded client cache does not expose a fixed stat type or value for this sprite.
Eternal AegisUnique damage reduction: Reduces incoming damage.
damageReductionUnique		DebuffNo strict boss match in client dataunknownReduces incoming damage.
Fist of ZharixKill shockwave: Kills trigger a shockwave that damages nearby enemies.
fistOfZharix		DebuffThree Emperors
Artifact 100% x10 @ 99%
unknownKills trigger a shockwave that damages nearby enemies.
Hyper Acid SplicerCorrosive ignite: Corrosive hits can splice the hull for extra corrosive damage.
corrosiveChanceToIgnite		DebuffNo strict boss match in client dataunknownCorrosive hits can splice the hull for extra corrosive damage.
Impact Emitter CoreSlow debuff: Hits can slow enemy movement for 4 seconds.
slowDown		DebuffNo strict boss match in client dataunknownHits can slow enemy movement for 4 seconds.
Legacy CoreLegacy ship upgrade: Legacy hull, shield, and armor upgrade for ships.
upgrade		UtilityNo strict boss match in client dataunknownLegacy hull, shield, and armor upgrade for ships.
Lunacite CoreLucanite core: Weapons can reduce the target's outgoing damage for 4 seconds.
lucaniteCore		DebuffNo strict boss match in client dataunknownWeapons can reduce the target's outgoing damage for 4 seconds.
Mantis CoreClose target damage core: Adds damage when the target is close.
mantisCore		BuffNo strict boss match in client dataunknownAdds damage when the target is close.
MotherbrainOvermind: Doubles pet count and increases pet health.
overmind		BuffMother Brain
Artifact 100% x6 @ 100%
unknownDoubles pet count and increases pet health.
Omega Shield DriverEnergy shield overload: Energy hits can overload shields for extra energy damage.
energyChanceToShieldOverload		DebuffNo strict boss match in client dataunknownEnergy hits can overload shields for extra energy damage.
Phase NullifierKinetic shield penetration: Kinetic hits can bypass shields and deal part of the kinetic damage directly to hull.
kineticChanceToPenetrateShield		DebuffNo strict boss match in client dataunknownKinetic hits can bypass shields and deal part of the kinetic damage directly to hull.
Plasma Disruptor RelicEnergy resistance debuff: Weapons can reduce target energy resistance for 4 seconds.
reduceEnergyResistance		DebuffNo strict boss match in client dataunknownWeapons can reduce target energy resistance for 4 seconds.
Ring of YxthalKinetic resistance debuff: Weapons can reduce target kinetic resistance for 4 seconds.
reduceKineticResistance		DebuffNo strict boss match in client dataunknownWeapons can reduce target kinetic resistance for 4 seconds.
Scourgebinder CoreCorrosive resistance debuff: Weapons can reduce target corrosive resistance for 4 seconds.
reduceCorrosiveResistance		DebuffNo strict boss match in client dataunknownWeapons can reduce target corrosive resistance for 4 seconds.
TefatFixed stat not exposed by the downloaded client cacheUnknownTefat
Artifact 100% x1 @ 100%
Artifact 100% x1 @ 100%
Artifact 100% x1 @ 100%
unknownThe downloaded client cache does not expose a fixed stat type or value for this sprite.
Thermofang CoreBurning target kinetic core: Adds kinetic damage against burning targets.

unknownGives damage reduction while cloaked and bonus ambush damage.
Velocity CoreVelocity core: Large ship speed increase.

Virex InjectorUnique debuff damage: Increases damage dealt by debuffs.

Want to improve this wiki? Contributions are welcome on github.com/guedesite/astroflux-wiki.
